name: paper-wiki
description: Paper Wiki asks, deposits, checks, updates, relinks, and redoes source-map-grounded academic paper knowledge.

interface.shortDescription: v1.0.6 | Paper Wiki: ask, deposit, check, update, graph visibility, relink, redo, refresh reference index, Zotero helper adapter.
interface.longDescription: Paper Wiki is one assistant for Paper Source handoffs: ask the formal graph, deposit ready papers, redo source-map extraction, check and repair Obsidian graph visibility drift, update/relink pages, maintain formal page relationships and stale claims, enforce provenance and language gates, refresh _meta/reference-index.json for Paper Source dedupe after wiki writes, keep formula reasoning chains and evidence figure cards source-grounded, run link repair, preserve QMD-compatible indexing, use the official Zotero helper through a thin audited adapter for future Paper Wiki Zotero sync surfaces, and finish with a post-task check.
defaultPrompt: Use PW / Paper Wiki to 提取并沉淀 Paper Source 论文到 wiki。
Use PW / Paper Wiki to 提问论文 wiki，回答并标记证据边界。
Use PW / Paper Wiki to 检测、修复关系图谱、更新、重link、重做论文 wiki，并报告 QMD 状态。
